sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91966" key="pwloma/xos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πωλομάχος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n91966.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">won in the chariot-race</tr_> (cf. <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πωλικός</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0545.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>), <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">νίκη</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.50</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
